questionHtml:
Which type(s) of fatty acid in the diet is/are positively correlated with an increased risk of coronary heart disease?

I.   Saturated

II.  Trans unsaturated

III. Cis unsaturated

A. I only 

B. I and II only

C. II only

D. II and III only

meta.title: Which type(s) of fatty acid in the diet is/are positively correlated with an increased risk of coronary heart disease? I. Saturated II. Trans unsaturated III. Cis unsaturated A. I
